title: OmniGraphIntegrationRun
description: stdin envelope for backend WASM integration micro-containers (omnigraph/integration-run/v1). The host validates this before invoking the guest; allowedFetchPrefixes must match host configuration.

plugin.description: Which integration guest to run (must match the loaded .wasm artifact)

allowedFetchPrefixes.description: Echo of host allowlist; guest should reject mismatches for defense in depth

credentials.description: Host-supplied secrets (e.g. token); never commit in repo configs

irContext.description: Optional slice of IR or labels passed to the plugin

pluginConfig.description: Plugin-specific non-secret options (e.g. NetBox site filter)
